smg.text: Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers at first. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 2 to 3 southerly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 2 to 3 southerly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few thundery showers later. Force 2 to 3 northerly winds, becoming force 4 to 5 northeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 5 to 6 east to northeasterly winds, occasionally force 7 with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 east to southeasterly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
